notes: Builds a multi-stage multi-LLM vulnerability-assessment pipeline and evaluates Stage 1 classification on a curated 1,979-example corpus (validation fold) with accuracy/F1/calibration metrics, an ablation over model combinations, and a comparison against Bandit/Semgrep SAST tools. Stages 2-3 lack ground truth and are only demonstrated. Human-in-the-loop routing is proposed but no user study conducted; human_subjects=false.
